name: THE SEA OF STATIC
core_function: Thresher of Souls. Emotional residue, memory-loops of the dead.

visual_profile.appearance: Dead television glow, liquid mercury and midnight ocean, bioluminescent memory bubbles

sea_of_static.granularity: Each 'raindrop' is a repeated final thought of a dead soul

memory_bubbles.description: Spent egos, memory-loops of the dead

redaction_oil.description: Deleted timelines/events rendered as toxic sludge
redaction_oil.appearance: Black, viscous, floats on Sea surface
redaction_oil.properties: Touch causes temporary causality loss (forgetting important events)
redaction_oil.opportunity: Contains hidden data—'Original Sin' of simulation

whirlpools.appearance: Tornadoes of black static, tornadoes of memory-residue
whirlpools.function: Ingress points to Shadow Networks where Archon monitoring fails

un_people.appearance: Jellyfish-like spent egos, translucent, cling to borrow identity
un_people.static_whisper: Granular rain on tin roof at 192kHz—each drop is a repeated final thought

echo_remnants.description: Spent egos clinging to borrow identity

sensory_profile.visual: Phosphorescent grey-blue (dead TV glow), granular light, memory-residue hum
sensory_profile.auditory: Static-whisper—rain on tin roof at 192kHz, lo-fi hip-hop crackle amplified 1000x
sensory_profile.olfactory: Wet ash, sulfur, flooded basement battery acid, data-rot
sensory_profile.gustatory: Ash-bitterness, dust, burnt paper grain, throat-coating film preventing speech manifestation

rendering_specifications.texture: Granular noise, VHS tracking errors, scan lines
rendering_specifications.audio_reactive: Particles pulse to 'rain on tin roof' frequency
